title: JEUIHAU 50 PCS 2 Inch White Stones for Painting, Large Round Painting Pebbles Natural Smooth Stones Flat White Rocks Decoration Stone for Painting, Arts, Crafts
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL - Our White Stones for Painting are made of silica, a material with a high degree of hardness, which guarantees its quality and stability, its smooth surface and its solid structure, providing you with the perfect basis for your creations.

DIY - White Round Painting Pebbles can be used for various DIY craft projects, such as painting and crafting. You can draw patterns and write on their surface, these versatile stones meet the needs of different DIY creative projects.

PACKAGE - A set contains 50 PCS of Large Painting Stones, the size 5 x 0.5 cm / 1.96 x 0.19 inch, you have enough quantity to create and decorate, to meet your different creative needs, you can enjoy experimenting with different painting styles.

WIDELY USED - Flat Smooth Pebbles are ideal for art creation, suitable for drawing, watercolour, acrylic and many other kinds of painting, you can use a variety of paints to create beautiful patterns on their surfaces, making them unique decorations and works of art.

SAFETY - The White Rocks For Painting are finely polished with rounded edges and no sharp edges, comfortable to the touch, safer and more secure to use, and the regular round pebbles have good stability, convenient for layouts and designs.
description: Product Description 50 PCS White Stones for Painting. 50 PCS of Large Painting Stones, the size 5 x 0.5 cm / 1.96 x 0.19 inch.
